titleStmt.title: SII 40.373: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 373. (A.R. No. 187 of 1934.) Guṇḍlapālem, Kandukur Taluk, Nellore District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a stone beam in the ceiling in the maṇḍapa of the Bhramarēśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 1446, Tāraṇa, Chaitra, śu. 10, Monday, corresponding to 1524 A.D., March 15.

Records the consecration of the images of dvārapālas at the southern entrance of the temple of Bhramarēśvara by Jagadobbagaṇḍa Rāvūri Rāghava-Reḍḍi of the Yānaṁbāli-gōtra and also records provisions are made for offerings by his brother Tammā Reḍḍi, for the merit of their parents.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī śālivāhanaśakavarṣaṁbulu 1446 Agunēṁṭi tāraṇa saṁvatsara caitra śu 10 sō śrīmatpaṁcyāśatkōṭi vistara pṛthivyāṁ . mūlastāna
śrī śelasya Ājeyaṭi vidvāramaṁdākini nadī tīrta nivāsa śrīmaṁnmahādēvadēvādidēvahāha hūhūgaṁdharvva manōrathaprada śrī Ārumūri bhramarēśvarasvāmiki ja
ganobbagaṁḍḍa saṁgrāmadhanaṁjaya śrī viṣṇupurāṇa pracaṁḍanāyaka yānaṁbāligotra saṁbhavuṁḍuna rāvūri rāghavareḍḍiṁgāru sāṣṭāṁgadaṁḍḍa praṇāmamuśeśi
samapiṁccina śivabhramarēśvara dēvuni māramaṁḍḍapānanu dakṣiṇa cavukamunnu dakṣiṇadvāramunnu dvārapālakulu bhadrasamētamai lakṣmī prati
mānu daṁḍḍānaḷulunnu pratiṣṭaśēśiri rāghavareḍḍiṁgāri sahōdaruṁḍu tammāreḍḍiṁgāru bhramēśvaradēvuni dēvasāramu
Āranu voka pāḷyamu Ācaṁdrārkamugānu tamataṁḍri basuvāreḍḍikini tamatalli Ammalammaṁgārikinni puṇyaṁgānu dēvuniki
samarppiṁcciri .
Digital edition of SII 40.373 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
